name: CQE_MORSR
expanded_name: CQE Middle-Out Resonance and Shape Reader
purpose: Provide the CQE-side MORSR umbrella for hidden-result validation, diagnostic scoring, and quadratically confirmed centroid extension.

canonical_loop.seed: C centroid derived from CQE context

required_cqe_layer.rule: CQE_MORSR maps diagnostic engine behavior to formal structure to validation product to library binding before creating a new datum.

required_universal_adapters.rule: All handshakes and networking bind through BBA plus Universal Adapter Programs before custom protocol work.
